Politics.headline: US, Iran mediators discuss potential 45-day ceasefire
Politics.detail: The U.S., Iran, and regional mediators are discussing a potential 45-day ceasefire to potentially end the war, but sources say the chances of reaching a deal in the next 48 hours are slim. This effort aims to prevent further escalation, including strikes on civilian infrastructure.

Politics.headline: Trump gives Iran 48-hour deadline to reopen Strait of Hormuz or "Hell will reign down"
Politics.detail: Amid ongoing conflict, Trump issued a 48-hour ultimatum to Iran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, threatening severe consequences if they fail to comply. The war continues with Iran responding to airstrikes with attacks across the region.

Politics.headline: Invitation to media – The Honourable Mélanie Joly to announce Government of Canada support for close to 100 SMEs in Quebec affected by the tariff situation
Politics.detail: The Canadian government is providing support to Quebec businesses affected by tariff pressures, helping them diversify markets and strengthen economic resilience. Mélanie Joly, along with other members of Parliament, will announce CED support for approximately 100 SMEs in Quebec.

Politics.headline: US Continues Strikes into Iran After Successful Rescue of F-15E Aircrew
Politics.detail: USCENTCOM announced the successful rescue of two American service members from Iran after their F-15E fighter jet was shot down on April 2 during a combat mission. U.S. strikes into Iran continue as U.S. Central Command forces dismantle the Iranian regime's ability to project power beyond its borders.

Politics.headline: Georgia lawmakers wrapped up the 2026 legislative session last week
Politics.detail: Georgia lawmakers concluded the 2026 legislative session last week but may reconvene for a second session later in the year. The state will initiate another grant cycle for community initiatives addressing the opioid crisis, utilizing settlement funds from opioid manufacturers and distributors.

Finance & Economy.headline: Thousands of small UK firms' energy bills set to more than double due to Iran war
Finance & Economy.detail: Higher energy costs resulting from the Iran war could pose a threat to the already fragile economics surrounding the AI boom.

Finance & Economy.headline: Amazon adds seller surcharge as oil spike from Iran tensions drives logistics costs higher
Finance & Economy.detail: Amazon is implementing a surcharge for sellers, attributing the decision to rising logistics costs influenced by the oil spike caused by tensions involving Iran.

Finance & Economy.headline: New UK farm inheritance tax rule will cause 'significant challenges', say accountants
Finance & Economy.detail: Accountants are warning that a new UK farm inheritance tax rule, which levies taxes on inherited farms and family businesses worth £2.5m or more and comes into force on April 6th, will create significant challenges.

Finance & Economy.headline: Canada trade deficit widens as gold drives record imports
Finance & Economy.detail: Canada's trade deficit has increased due to a surge in gold imports, reaching record levels.

Finance & Economy.headline: Sick pay rule changes to benefit up to 9.6m UK workers, TUC says
Finance & Economy.detail: The Trades Union Congress (TUC) reports that upcoming changes to sick pay regulations are expected to positively impact as many as 9.6 million workers in the UK.

Technology.headline: Gartner Announces Gartner Security & Risk Management Summit 2026
Technology.detail: The summit will address how AI, leadership, and cloud security will help organizations address mission-critical challenges in a rapidly evolving cybersecurity landscape.

Technology.headline: Mobix Labs lands $3.2M TSA scanner order for 2026
Technology.detail: Mobix Labs has received a $3.2 million order for components used in TSA airport body scanners, bringing the total program activity to over $6 million, with shipments expected through December 2026.

Technology.headline: Deadline to test AI scholarly search tools fast approaching
Technology.detail: Washington State University Libraries is offering faculty, staff, and students a limited time to test and provide feedback on three AI-powered research platforms: Scite.ai, Consensus, and Undermind.ai.

Technology.headline: China stands to benefit most from the war-driven energy crisis
Technology.detail: As the oil and gas crisis stemming from the war in Iran accelerates the transition to renewable energy, China is poised to benefit due to its dominance in the supply chains for solar panels, wind turbines, batteries, and electric vehicles, with exports already climbing.

Technology.headline: AI machine sorts clothes faster than humans to boost textile recycling in China
Technology.detail: An AI machine in China is sorting clothes faster than humans to improve textile recycling efforts.

Science.headline: These Bizarre New Tarantulas Turn Mating Into a Fight for Survival
Science.detail: A newly discovered group of tarantulas is so bizarre that scientists had to invent a whole new genus—Satyrex—to describe them; these spiders have unusually long mating appendages and fierce, hissing defenses.

Science.headline: Scientists May Finally Detect Hidden Ripples in Spacetime
Science.detail: Scientists have taken a major step toward probing one of physics' biggest mysteries—how gravity and quantum mechanics fit together—by creating the first unified way to detect tiny “ripples” in spacetime itself.

Science.headline: A Drug Already in Trials May Finally Stop Hepatitis E
Science.detail: Scientists have identified a potential new weapon against hepatitis E, a virus with no approved treatment and tens of thousands of deaths each year; the drug bemnifosbuvir, currently in trials for hepatitis C, was found to block the virus.

Science.headline: Diabetes drug metformin may echo the benefits of exercise in prostate cancer care
Science.detail: A recent study suggests that the diabetes drug metformin might mimic the beneficial effects of exercise in prostate cancer treatment.

Science.headline: A Special Protein in Your Gut Has The Power to Neutralize Bacteria
Science.detail: Researchers have discovered that a particular protein in the gut can neutralize bacteria, offering new insights into gut health.

Health.headline: RFK Jr, EPA chief 'declare war' on microplastics amid growing evidence of health risks
Health.detail: The Trump administration is targeting microplastics in food and water under the MAHA agenda, citing growing evidence of potential health risks.

Health.headline: Common drinking habit may quietly triple risk of advanced liver condition
Health.detail: A new USC study suggests that even occasional binge drinking could triple the risk of advanced liver fibrosis, highlighting the danger of certain alcohol consumption patterns.

Health.headline: 95-year-old swimmer's workouts stun experts as she defies aging, shows others how to stay strong
Health.detail: Jane Asher, a 95-year-old great-grandmother, has set five swimming world records and credits swimming for her good health.

Health.headline: Imaging study sheds light on how deep brain stimulation acts on Parkinson's disease
Health.detail: A recent imaging study provides new insights into the mechanisms by which deep brain stimulation impacts Parkinson's disease.

Health.headline: Medical news in brief: New GMC rules on doctors' beliefs, Scotland rejects assisted dying, missed TB cases, and other stories
Health.detail: The BMJ provides a concise overview of recent medical news, including updates on GMC rules for doctors, the rejection of assisted dying in Scotland, and reports of missed tuberculosis cases.

Sports.headline: UCLA faces a massive rebuild after a historic NCAA title run as the transfer portal opens
Sports.detail: After a historic NCAA title run, UCLA is facing a massive rebuild as the transfer portal opens. It is a developing story how they will address this challenge.

Sports.headline: Edge rusher Travon Walker and the Jaguars agree on a 4-year, $110M contract extension
Sports.detail: The Jacksonville Jaguars and edge rusher Travon Walker have agreed to a 4-year, $110 million contract extension. This solidifies Walker's place as a key player for the team's defense.

Sports.headline: Thomas' 1st hat trick lifts Blues past Avalanche
Sports.detail: Robert Thomas scored his first career hat trick to lead the St. Louis Blues to a victory over the Colorado Avalanche. The Blues are looking to solidify their playoff position.

Sports.headline: Rugby India Announces 2nd Edition Of Rugby Premier League In Hyderabad
Sports.detail: Rugby India has announced the second edition of the Rugby Premier League will be held in Hyderabad. This aims to further develop rugby in India.

Sports.headline: Caroline Dubois beats Terri Harper on points and adds WBO to WBC lightweight title
Sports.detail: Caroline Dubois defeated Terri Harper on points to add the WBO lightweight title to her WBC title. This victory further establishes Dubois as a force in the lightweight division.

Entertainment.headline: Deontay Wilder calls out Joshua after beating Derek Chisora
Entertainment.detail: Deontay Wilder called out Anthony Joshua for a long-awaited matchup between the former heavyweight champions after Wilder edged Derek Chisora to clinch a split-decision victory in London on Saturday.

Entertainment.headline: A large group of masked men stormed an entertainment outlet in Taman Shamelin, Cheras
Entertainment.detail: A video went viral showing a truck ramming into a gate before a group of masked men rushed into the premises wielding weapons and damaging property; police are investigating.

Entertainment.headline: Movie stars join forces to buy Auckland film and TV studio
Entertainment.detail: Momoa, Waititi, and Curtis buy Auckland studio in major screen industry move.

Entertainment.headline: Tori Spelling Car Crash: Updates on the Accident, Her Kids & More
Entertainment.detail: Tori Spelling and four of her children were hospitalized after a car crash in California, and updates are being reported.

Entertainment.headline: Eugene Mirman Seriously Injured in Car Crash
Entertainment.detail: Eugene Mirman, the actor from Bob's Burgers, was seriously injured in a car crash.

Crime & Justice.headline: Police 'under attack' and arrests made after 2000 people attend illegal rave
Crime & Justice.detail: Police officers responding to an illegal rave in Dorset were attacked with missiles, leading to multiple arrests for offences including driving under the influence and assaulting an emergency worker; equipment was seized under the Criminal Justice and Public Order Act 1994.

Crime & Justice.headline: Compensation for crime victims capped in 1996 not enough, say campaigners
Crime & Justice.detail: Campaigners are calling for an end to the 30-year freeze on compensation for crime victims in England, Scotland and Wales, arguing that the maximum payout of £500,000 is insufficient to provide for a lifetime of care for those with severe, life-changing injuries.

Crime & Justice.headline: Bereaved family sues over 'hostage justice'
Crime & Justice.detail: The family of a man who died in prolonged pretrial detention after being wrongfully arrested is suing the state of Japan, challenging the criminal justice system's presumption of guilt and reliance on coerced confessions.

Crime & Justice.headline: Crime log: Student reports assault on I Street Mall
Crime & Justice.detail: A female student at George Washington University reported being assaulted on I Street Mall, and GW Police are investigating.

Crime & Justice.headline: Hubs to help young people away from crime and into work to open in England
Crime & Justice.detail: Hubs designed to steer young individuals away from criminal activities and towards employment opportunities are set to be established across England.

Education.headline: Public access to CT college course syllabi threatened under new proposal
Education.detail: A new proposal in Connecticut threatens public access to college course syllabi, raising concerns about transparency in higher education.

Education.headline: University of Wyoming selects Reeves as next president
Education.detail: The University of Wyoming has chosen Reeves as its next president, marking a new chapter for the institution.

Education.headline: Georgetown University to offer pornography course to students
Education.detail: Georgetown University is set to offer a course on pornography to its students, sparking debate and discussion.

Education.headline: Wake County school employee arrested for assault on disabled student, records show
Education.detail: A Wake County school employee was arrested for assaulting a disabled student, according to official records.

Education.headline: Georgia teachers union boss blames school choice for public schools being 'grossly underfunded'
Education.detail: The head of the Georgia teachers union is attributing the underfunding of public schools to school choice initiatives.

Lifestyle.headline: Shinee's Minho and Physical: 100's Hong Beom-seok win their division at Hyrox Singapore 2026
Lifestyle.detail: The duo took home first place in the Doubles Men 35-39 division at Hyrox Singapore 2026 with a time of 56 minutes and 21 seconds, while also placing fourth overall among 1,144 competitors.

Lifestyle.headline: Chesney the kangaroo scales tall fence and flees petting zoo for three days on the lam
Lifestyle.detail: Chesney, a kangaroo, escaped from a petting zoo and was on the loose for three days.

Lifestyle.headline: Amanda Holden wakes up at 5am to maintain health and fitness
Lifestyle.detail: Amanda Holden has revealed that she wakes up at 5am to maintain her physique.

Lifestyle.headline: Karishma Tanna announces first pregnancy at 42: The growing trend and medical reality of motherhood in your 40s.
Lifestyle.detail: Karishma Tanna announced her first pregnancy at 42, highlighting the increasing trend and medical considerations of motherhood in the 40s.

Lifestyle.headline: How three volleyball players from Kerala started a thriving mushroom business
Lifestyle.detail: Three volleyball players from Kerala have successfully established a mushroom business.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Viktor Orban's illiberal nationalism has failed Hungary
Opinion/Editorial.detail: An opinion piece in The Washington Post argues that Viktor Orban's 16-year experiment in Hungary has not achieved its stated goals and has made the country poorer and less free, despite being seen as a bastion of conservative values by some.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Japan embarked on dangerous militarized path: China Daily editorial
Opinion/Editorial.detail: China Daily warns that Japan's rearmament and military expansion, including revising arms export guidelines and aligning its strategy with the United States, pose a threat to regional stability and violate the spirit of its Constitution.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Opinion: State Rep. Mary Mushinsky is a legend
Opinion/Editorial.detail: A viewpoint piece in the CT Mirror praises State Rep. Mary Mushinsky for her leadership and mentorship, particularly for women in the legislature, and her advocacy for clean water and thoughtful energy policy in Connecticut.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Kalayaan by no other name
Opinion/Editorial.detail: An editorial in Inquirer.net discusses the act of naming a tiny sandbar or submerged atoll, highlighting its significance against the gray-zone tactics of an unfriendly neighbor.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: This great, bipartisan housing bill has a major flaw
Opinion/Editorial.detail: An opinion piece in The Washington Post discusses how a bipartisan housing bill undermines a fast-growing source of new single-family homes: build-to-rent communities.

World.headline: Israel Strikes Major Iranian Petrochemical Plant After Trump's Threats Over Infrastructure
World.detail: Amid rising tensions, Israel has reportedly struck a major Iranian petrochemical plant following threats from President Trump regarding Iran's infrastructure. The strike comes as part of the ongoing conflict and escalating rhetoric between the two nations.

World.headline: Myanmar Junta Chief Min Aung Hlaing Appointed President After 'Sham' Election
World.detail: Following what has been widely criticized as a 'sham' election, Myanmar's junta chief, Min Aung Hlaing, has been appointed as the country's president. The move further solidifies the military's control over the nation amid ongoing political turmoil.

World.headline: U.S. Rescues Downed Airman From Iran, Says Trump; Tehran Claims it Destroyed Several U.S. Aircraft
World.detail: President Trump announced the successful rescue of a downed U.S. airman from Iran in what he called a daring operation, while Tehran claimed to have destroyed several U.S. aircraft. The conflicting reports highlight the heightened tensions and ongoing conflict between the two countries.

World.headline: Iran Strikes Kuwait's Oil Infrastructure Before OPEC+ Supply Talks
World.detail: In a move that has further destabilized the region, Iran has reportedly struck Kuwait's oil infrastructure just before crucial OPEC+ supply talks. This attack raises concerns about the stability of oil supplies and potential economic repercussions.

World.headline: One Killed and Buildings Damaged as Magnitude 7.4 Earthquake Strikes Indonesia
World.detail: A magnitude 7.4 earthquake has struck Indonesia, causing damage to buildings and resulting in at least one fatality. The earthquake highlights the region's vulnerability to seismic activity and the need for improved disaster preparedness.

Zimbabwe.headline: Hoteliers ready to host visitors during ZITF 2026
Zimbabwe.detail: Hoteliers are preparing to accommodate visitors for the Zimbabwe International Trade Fair (ZITF) 2026.

Zimbabwe.headline: Emotional send-off for six crash dead family members
Zimbabwe.detail: A somber farewell was held for six family members who tragically died in a car crash.

Zimbabwe.headline: All set for rollout of new ZiG notes
Zimbabwe.detail: Preparations are complete for the introduction of the new Zimbabwe Gold (ZiG) notes into circulation.

Zimbabwe.headline: Keep promoting peace, love: President
Zimbabwe.detail: The President urged citizens to continue promoting peace and love.

Zimbabwe.headline: Emotional send off for Mujuru family members who perished in horrific accident
Zimbabwe.detail: Family members of the Mujuru family, who died in a horrific accident, were given an emotional send-off.
